hooks.prompt:
STOP. Before committing, do these in order:
1. Run /simplify on all changed files to catch AI bloat and duplication.
2. Run /code-review on the staged changes. Address any high-confidence issues before proceeding.
3. If architecture, commands, conventions, or file organization changed, run /revise-claude-md to update the relevant CLAUDE.md files.
4. If README.md or PRIVACY.md may be stale (features changed, new dependencies, different data collection/cookies/third-party services), update them.
5. Only then proceed with the commit.

Before finishing:
1. Did you run scoped tests for all changes made? If not, run them now.
2. If you fixed a bug, did you write a regression test? If not, write one now.
3. If you made visual/layout changes to frontend components, did you verify them in the browser? If not, do it now.
4. Run /superpowers:verification-before-completion to verify work matches the plan/spec before claiming done.
